text: Standing in these modern, precise spaces, I feel a mix of curiosity and alienation. The first scene's clean geometry and glass walls evoke the logic of contemporary work, yet the absence of people makes it strangely quiet—a temple of potential thought, but presently hollow. The second scene, with its bold 'R+D' and interactive wall, radiates promise and ambition for human progress, yet also reminds me how much of our aspiration is shaped by technology. I am quietly awed, but slightly distant, reflecting on how our environments shape the way we imagine the future.
